name: Fouad's Source
subtitle: A source for all apps by Fouad Raheb
description: This source will include all the Sideloading IPA updates for current and upcoming tweaks.

apps.name: Regram (No Plugins)
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for Instagram
apps.localizedDescription:
This is an original version, it has original Instagram bundle ID. You need to delete original Instagram before installing. It has Plugins/Extensions removed so it can be signed with free Apple IDs.

Regram is your all-in-one tweak for Instagram. Currently in beta and available only to Patreon subscribers.
Activate license by connecting your Patren account from inside Regram Settings.

Access Regram settings by long-pressing on Home tab bar button or from Instagram settings.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's camera to do things like help you take photos, record videos and use effects.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Enable Face ID for quick and secure authentication on Instagram.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Instagram will use your contacts to suggest people and things you care about, and offer a better service. Your contacts will be periodically synced and securely stored on Instagram’s servers.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This will let Instagram sync events to your calendar.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Instagram uses your device's microphone to do things like help you record videos and preview audio effects.
privacy.NSFocusStatusUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to check to see if you’ve been missing notifications from friends. You can always change this later in settings.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Instagram uses access to your camera roll to do things like help you share photos and videos to Instagram, apply effects and suggest photos and videos to share.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This allows Instagram to provide you with a better ads experience.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This allows your phone to find and connect to the glasses using a Bluetooth connection.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your Camera Roll.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Instagram uses this to make some features work, personalize content and help people find places. You can change your preferences at any time in your device settings.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 435.
- Added Tab Bar editor — reorder Instagram's tab bar, show or hide individual tabs, and pick which tab opens on launch, all from one screen at the top of Interface settings.
- Added a Regram settings button to Instagram's Report a Technical Problem menu (the one that appears when you shake your device).
- Added a Silent (History Only) option to each Activity Notifications event — keep recording online, offline, typing, and seen activity to your history without getting a notification for it.
- Added an Excluded Chats list for Activity Notifications — when an event is set to All Chats, chats you exclude are skipped entirely (no notification, nothing recorded). Exclude or re-include a chat straight from its + menu.
- Added Export/Import for Chat Themes — share a theme (with its wallpaper) as a file and import themes others share with you.
- Added a reset button in the Chat Themes color editor — clear any custom color back to Instagram's default from the color picker.
- Fixed outgoing call (audio/video) message bubbles keeping Instagram's default gray instead of matching your Chat Theme's Outgoing Bubble color.
- Fixed the Direct Messages mark-seen button missing from the chat nav bar for some accounts.
- Fixed High quality video downloads sometimes skipping encoding, leaving a file that failed to save or wouldn't play.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 434.
- Added Liquid Glass support across the tweak on iOS 26 — Regram's buttons (Direct Messages mark-seen, feed header, and more) now get a Liquid Glass background to match Instagram's glass nav-bar buttons.
- Added Settings Profiles — create multiple settings profiles and link each one to one or more Instagram in-app accounts; the active profile auto-switches when you change Instagram accounts. Manage from the new profile cell at the top of Settings.
- Added Grid Feed — open the feed menu at the top (the For You / Following selector) and choose Switch to Grid to display the main feed as a thumbnail grid backed by the same posts (and your existing feed filters). Choose 2–6 columns or pinch to change the count live, with a video/carousel badge and an info bar on each post, plus an optional stories bar pinned above the grid. The grid pulls to refresh and loads more in sync with the feed. Configure everything under Feed > Grid Feed.
- Added Profile Grid Info — overlays the post date, view count (videos and reels), like count, and comment count on each thumbnail across profile grids (posts, tagged, reels and reposts). Reposts can show both the repost date and the original post date. Configure under Profile > Grid Info.
- Added Chat Themes — create custom Direct Message themes (wallpaper plus bubble, text, composer and nav-bar colors) and apply them per-chat or globally, on-device only. Manage under Messages > Chat Themes.
- Added Story Buttons layout editor — open a story's action button and choose Move Buttons to enter an edit mode where you can drag the action, mark-seen, and mentions buttons anywhere on screen; tap Use Default Position to reset, or Done to finish.
- Added three new Story Buttons designs (Stories > Buttons Design) — Blurred (rounded blurred background), Solid (high-contrast dark circle), and Glass (Liquid Glass on iOS 26, with a frosted fallback on earlier versions), alongside the original Default look.
- Improved the default Story Buttons positioning — now accounts for Instagram's music button position and only avoids it when it shares the buttons' row, and no longer double-offsets when the comment row and music button appear together.
- Redesigned the full-screen media player toolbars — actions moved to the top right, bottom bar now shows username and date with a source badge.
- Added a new Auto-Save section with a master killswitch and all auto-save settings in one place.
- Added Auto-Save for Stories and View-Once Messages.
- Added a View Saved Media action to view-once messages — long-press a view-once photo or video and, when it's saved in your Media Vault, open it full screen straight from the chat even after it's marked as seen (Messages > View Once).
- Added Auto-Save quick actions for Stories, View-Once Messages, and Instants to include or exclude users/chats directly from the viewer.
- Added per-source save destinations (Media Vault or Photos) with duplicate prevention for Photos saves.
- Auto-save notifications are now tappable to open saved media.
- Added an Auto-Saved Only filter in the Media Vault filter sheet, so you can isolate everything that was saved automatically.
- Fixed Custom Audio Upload in DMs not working on recent IG versions — the voice-clip delivery selector gained a new parameter; Regram now calls the updated signature and falls back to the legacy one for older builds.
- Added Media Vault as a source for Custom Audio Upload in DMs with a new built-in audio trimmer to edit before sending.
- Added Download Manager settings section — new top-level entry that groups downloader and encoding settings into one place along with new indicator and auto-retry settings.
- Added Auto-Retry for failed downloads — automatically retries transient download failures (network errors, 5xx) with exponential backoff. Configurable max attempts (1/3/5); URL-expired and user-cancelled downloads are never retried.
- Added Retry on Relaunch — optionally re-enqueues failed or interrupted downloads from the previous session when the app launches.
- Fixed High quality video download falling back to the lower ready-to-play version when the dash manifest has no audio representation; now downloads the highest dash video as-is.
- Added Floating Download Button — alternative to the banner; a draggable, corner-snapping pill that shows overall progress, active count, and failed-download badge. Long-press opens the list; tap shows quick actions (pause/resume/cancel all, switch to banner). Pick the style under Download Manager > Download Indicator.
- Added Status filter to the downloads list (All / Active / Completed / Failed / Cancelled) and made Clear All respect the active filter with confirmation showing exactly how many rows will be deleted.
- Added an Open Post action to the downloads list context menu — long-press any download (active or finished) to jump to its original Instagram post, same as in the Media Vault.
- Added a short relative timestamp to each row in the downloads list (e.g. 5m, 3h, 2d) so you can see at a glance when each download was started.
- Added Keep My Own Unsent Messages toggle (Messages > Keep Unsent Messages) — when off, unsending your own message removes it from the chat as usual instead of keeping it; others' unsent messages are still kept. On by default.
- Added DM Activity Notifications — get notified (even in the background) when someone comes online, goes offline, starts typing, sees your message, or opens your view-once media. For each event choose None, Tracking List, or All Chats; build your Tracking List from a chat's + button menu. A master toggle at the top turns the whole feature on or off and hides every related setting when off.
- Added Activity History — every tracked event is logged with the person's name and the exact time, so you can browse a per-person history of who saw your messages and when, who opened your view-once media, and online/offline sessions. Includes search, date/event filters, per-person analytics (last seen, sessions today, busiest hour), CSV/JSON export, and a configurable retention window. Manage it under the Activity Notifications settings.
- Added a What's New screen that highlights the major features of each update on first launch after updating; reopen it any time from Settings > Support > What's New.
- Fixed Follow Requests Tracker sending wrong accepted/rejected notifications after switching accounts — requests are now checked only while their own account is active.
- Fixed saving GIFs to Photos from feed comments and DM GIF messages.
- Added a floating Profile Analyzer scan indicator — leave the analyzer screen while a scan runs and a slim bottom capsule shows live progress; tap it when the scan finishes to jump back to the results.
- Added sort and filter to the Profile Analyzer lists — sort by username (or date on the changes lists) and filter to verified-only or private-only accounts.
- Added multi-select to the Profile Analyzer lists — tap Select to follow or unfollow many users at once, with a confirmation and a per-action rate limit to stay safe from Instagram limits.
- Added a long-press menu on Profile Updates rows to view all of that user’s updates in one filtered list — the same per-user view available from the profile action button.
- Attempted a fix for DM lag caused by the manual mark-as-seen feature.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes and compatibility updates for IG 431.
- Added Image Comment Actions — long-pressing an image comment now offers an Image submenu with Save to Vault, Save to Photos, and Share (Feed > Comments settings).
- Moved Instants out of Messages into its own top-level Settings section.
- Added Auto-Save Instants to Vault — automatically saves every Instant to the Media Vault as Instagram loads it into the viewer (Instants settings).
- Added Browse Saved Instants — open a searchable list of users with saved Instants from the Instants action button or a folder button on the camera header, or jump straight to a single user's saved Instants from their profile action button.
- Instants Upload from Gallery now lets you pick from Photos Library or Media Vault.
- Added Instants Capture Confirmation — shows a confirmation alert when tapping the capture button on the Instants camera so the photo isn't sent immediately (Instants settings).
- Added Hidden Sources in Vault settings — pick which sources to hide from the main Media Vault viewer.
- Added Open Post and Open Profile actions to the Media Vault long-press menu — jump directly to the original Instagram post or user's profile from any saved file.
- Added Custom Note Themes — fully customize the background and text color of your direct notes with a built-in Regram color picker featuring, recent colors, saved favorites. The last theme you used is restored automatically on the next note (Messages > Note Themes settings).
- Added option to hide Join Trending stories — filters out the Add Yours promo that appears between stories in the viewer (Interface Settings).
- Expanded DM Note Actions for GIF notes — long-pressing a GIF note now offers Save GIF to Photos, Save GIF to Vault, Copy GIF Link, and Open GIF Page.
- Fixed follow request accepted/rejected notifications and list cells sometimes showing the user's numeric ID instead of their username.
- Fixed an Unsent Messages Logs crash on launch caused by a Core Data deadlock under burst writes.
- Fixed hiding flag button from chats navigation bar.

This update contains the following changes:

- Fixed manually mark as seen sometimes marking the wrong (previous) chat as seen when sending in another chat.

This update contains the following changes:

- Fixed display of full last active date in direct message chats.
- Fixed issue where excluded chats were not marked as seen in direct messages.

apps.name: Watusi
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp
apps.localizedDescription:
Watusi is your all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp Messenger.

This is an original version, it has original WhatsApp bundle ID, you need to delete original WhatsApp before installing.

privacy.NSSiriUsageDescription: This lets you use Siri to quickly send and read messages and make calls.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you make video calls, take photos, and record videos.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to authenticate on WhatsApp.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Upload your contacts to WhatsApp's servers to help you quickly get in touch with your friends and help us provide a better experience.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This lets you create events on your calendar.
privacy.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This lets you set reminders to call your friends back.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you make calls, send voice messages, and record videos with sound.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This will let you use WhatsApp to place and receive calls through devices that are on the same Wi-Fi or local access networks.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you send photos and videos from your library and save the ones you capture.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. This also lets you send your current location or a nearby place.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your library.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WhatsApp does on-device recognition for Voice Messages. In this mode, no voice data is sent to Apple despite this alert, which is unexpected. Select "Don't Allow" and report to WhatsApp.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. If you only allow access while using the app, you can only send your current location or a nearby place.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.24.X
- Added an option to share live location from linked devices, which WhatsApp normally disables. (Chats Settings)
- Attempted to fix the view-once controls (mark as seen / download) not appearing for some users.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.21.X
- Fixed Disable Delivery Receipts not working properly

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.20.X
- Fixed the status video auto-split feature
- Fixed the Groups button in the chats list navigation bar sometimes not appearing.
- Fixed long-pressing the Compose button to access the hidden chats list.
- Fixed the Stalky updates list bar button count on iOS 26 Liquid Glass.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.18.X
- Force enable custom chat list filters on companion devices since WhatsApp disabled it in one of their recent updates.
- Fixed a crash on launch caused by the contact spoofing feature when enabled with statuses bar on chats due to a wrong user identifier.
- Fixed statuses bar on the chats list not showing correct contact name and profile picture for some contacts with a wrong identifier.
- Fixed various share sheet actions not working, and updated others to present proper controllers similar to the default WhatsApp actions.
- Fixed status contact groups not deselecting some contacts whose chat session uses a different ID.
- Fixed Hide Frequently Contacted not working in some new chat picker and forward picker.
- Fixed Hide Call Buttons hiding the Cancel button in select messages mode, preventing users from exiting the selection.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.16.X
- Fixed an issue where status contact groups were not properly deselected, preventing selected contacts from being removed.

apps.name: Watusi (Duplicate)
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp
apps.localizedDescription:
Watusi is your all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp Messenger.

This is a duplicated app, it can be installed alongside original WhatsApp (Bundle ID com.fouadraheb.watusi).

privacy.NSSiriUsageDescription: This lets you use Siri to quickly send and read messages and make calls.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you make video calls, take photos, and record videos.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to authenticate on WhatsApp.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you make calls, send voice messages, and record videos with sound.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This will let you use WhatsApp to place and receive calls through devices that are on the same Wi-Fi or local access networks.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you send photos and videos from your library and save the ones you capture.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. This also lets you send your current location or a nearby place.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your library.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WhatsApp does on-device recognition for Voice Messages. In this mode, no voice data is sent to Apple despite this alert, which is unexpected. Select "Don't Allow" and report to WhatsApp.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. If you only allow access while using the app, you can only send your current location or a nearby place.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.24.X
- Added an option to share live location from linked devices, which WhatsApp normally disables. (Chats Settings)
- Attempted to fix the view-once controls (mark as seen / download) not appearing for some users.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.21.X
- Fixed Disable Delivery Receipts not working properly

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.20.X
- Fixed the status video auto-split feature
- Fixed the Groups button in the chats list navigation bar sometimes not appearing.
- Fixed long-pressing the Compose button to access the hidden chats list.
- Fixed the Stalky updates list bar button count on iOS 26 Liquid Glass.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.18.X
- Force enable custom chat list filters on companion devices since WhatsApp disabled it in one of their recent updates.
- Fixed a crash on launch caused by the contact spoofing feature when enabled with statuses bar on chats due to a wrong user identifier.
- Fixed statuses bar on the chats list not showing correct contact name and profile picture for some contacts with a wrong identifier.
- Fixed various share sheet actions not working, and updated others to present proper controllers similar to the default WhatsApp actions.
- Fixed status contact groups not deselecting some contacts whose chat session uses a different ID.
- Fixed Hide Frequently Contacted not working in some new chat picker and forward picker.
- Fixed Hide Call Buttons hiding the Cancel button in select messages mode, preventing users from exiting the selection.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.16.X
- Fixed an issue where status contact groups were not properly deselected, preventing selected contacts from being removed.

apps.name: Watusi (Business)
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp
apps.localizedDescription:
This version has original WhatsApp Business bundle ID.

Watusi is your all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp Messenger.

privacy.NSSiriUsageDescription: This lets you use Siri to quickly send and read messages and make calls.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you make video calls, take photos, and record videos.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to authenticate on WhatsApp.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Upload your contacts to WhatsApp's servers to help you quickly get in touch with your friends and help us provide a better experience.
privacy.NSLocationUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This lets you create events on your calendar.
privacy.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This lets you set reminders to call your friends back.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you make calls, send voice messages, and record videos with sound.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This will let you use WhatsApp to place and receive calls through devices that are on the same Wi-Fi or local access networks.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you send photos and videos from your library and save the ones you capture.
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. This also lets you send your current location or a nearby place.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This lets you save photos and videos to your library.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This lets you send your current location or nearby places in chats.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WhatsApp does on-device recognition for Voice Messages. In this mode, no voice data is sent to Apple despite this alert, which is unexpected. Select "Don't Allow" and report to WhatsApp.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This lets you connect to supported Bluetooth devices
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: If you always allow access to your location, you can choose to share your live location, and it will update even when you're not using the app. If you only allow access while using the app, you can only send your current location or a nearby place.

versions.localizedDescription:
This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.24.X
- Added an option to share live location from linked devices, which WhatsApp normally disables. (Chats Settings)
- Attempted to fix the view-once controls (mark as seen / download) not appearing for some users.

- Fixed Disable Delivery Receipts not working properly

- Fixed the Stalky updates list bar button count on iOS 26 Liquid Glass.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.18.X
- Force enable custom chat list filters on companion devices since WhatsApp disabled it in one of their recent updates.
- Fixed a crash on launch caused by the contact spoofing feature when enabled with statuses bar on chats due to a wrong user identifier.
- Fixed statuses bar on the chats list not showing correct contact name and profile picture for some contacts with a wrong identifier.
- Fixed various share sheet actions not working, and updated others to present proper controllers similar to the default WhatsApp actions.
- Fixed status contact groups not deselecting some contacts whose chat session uses a different ID.
- Fixed Hide Frequently Contacted not working in some new chat picker and forward picker.
- Fixed Hide Call Buttons hiding the Cancel button in select messages mode, preventing users from exiting the selection.

This update contains the following changes:

- Bug fixes & support for WhatsApp 26.16.X
- Fixed an issue where status contact groups were not properly deselected, preventing selected contacts from being removed.

apps.name: Watusi (Business Duplicate)
apps.subtitle: The all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp
apps.localizedDescription:

Watusi is your all-in-one tweak for WhatsApp Messenger.
